name: IdsEdwPaymtRductnFExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH mainset AS (SELECT PMTRDTN.PAYMT_RDUCTN_SK AS PAYMT_RDUCTN_SK, PMTRDTN.PAYMT_RDUCTN_REF_ID AS PAYMT_RDUCTN_REF_ID, COALESCE(CDMPG1.TRGT_CD,'UNK') AS PAYMT_RDUCTN_SUBTYP_CD, COALESCE(CDMPG2.TRGT_CD,'UNK') AS SRC_SYS_CD, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate} AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, PMTRDTN.PAYE_PROV_SK AS PAYE_PROV_SK, PMTRDTN.APP_USER_SK AS APP_USER_SK, COALESCE(CDMPG3.TRGT_CD,'UNK') AS PAYMT_RDUCTN_EXCD, COALESCE(CDMPG3.TRGT_CD_NM,'UNK') AS PAYMT_RDUCTN_EXPL_NM, COALESCE(CDMPG4.TRGT_CD,'UNK') AS PAYMT_RDUCTN_PAYE_TYP_CD, COALESCE(CDMPG4.TRGT_CD_NM,'UNK') AS PAYMT_RDUCTN_PAYE_TYP_NM, COALESCE(CDMPG5.TRGT_CD,'UNK') AS PAYMT_RDUCTN_PRM_TYP_CD, COALESCE(CDMPG5.TRGT_CD_NM,'UNK') AS PAYMT_RDUCTN_PRM_TYP_NM, COALESCE(CDMPG6.TRGT_CD,'UNK') AS PAYMT_RDUCTN_STTUS_CD, COALESCE(CDMPG6.TRGT_CD_NM,'UNK') AS PAYMT_RDUCTN_STTUS_NM, COALESCE(CDMPG1.TRGT_CD_NM,'UNK') AS PAYMT_RDUCTN_SUBTYP_NM, COALESCE(CDMPG7.TRGT_CD,'UNK') AS PAYMT_RDUCTN_TYP_CD, COALESCE(CDMPG7.TRGT_CD_NM,'UNK') AS PAYMT_RDUCTN_TYP_NM, PMTRDTN.AUTO_PAYMT_RDUCTN_IN AS AUTO_PAYMT_RDUCTN_IN, PMTRDTN.CRT_DT_SK AS CRT_DT_SK, PMTRDTN.PLN_YR_DT_SK AS PLN_YR_DT_SK, PMTRDTN.ORIG_RDUCTN_AMT AS ORIG_RDUCTN_AMT, PMTRDTN.PCA_OVERPD_NET_AMT AS PCA_OVERPD_NET_AMT, PMTRDTN.RCVD_AMT AS RCVD_AMT, PMTRDTN.RCVRED_AMT AS RCVRED_AMT, PMTRDTN.REMN_NET_AMT AS REMN_NET_AMT, PMTRDTN.WRT_OFF_AMT AS WRT_OFF_AMT, PMTRDTN.RDUCTN_DESC AS RDUCTN_DESC, PMTRDTN.TAX_YR AS TAX_YR, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, PMTRDTN.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK AS IDS_LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, PMTRDTN.PAYMT_RDUCTN_EXCD_SK AS PAYMT_RDUCTN_EXCD_SK, PMTRDTN.PAYMT_RDUCTN_PAYE_TYP_CD_SK AS PAYMT_RDUCTN_PAYE_TYP_CD_SK, PMTRDTN.PAYMT_RDUCTN_PRM_TYP_CD_SK AS PAYMT_RDUCTN_PRM_TYP_CD_SK, PMTRDTN.PAYMT_RDUCTN_STTUS_CD_SK AS PAYMT_RDUCTN_STTUS_CD_SK, PMTRDTN.PAYMT_RDUCTN_SUBTYP_CD_SK AS PAYMT_RDUCTN_SUBTYP_CD_SK, PMTRDTN.PAYMT_RDUCTN_TYP_CD_SK AS PAYMT_RDUCTN_TYP_CD_SK FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.PAYMT_RDUCTN PMTRDTN LEFT JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG CDMPG1 ON PMTRDTN.PAYMT_RDUCTN_SUBTYP_CD_SK=CDMPG1.CD_MPPNG_SK LEFT JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG CDMPG2 ON PMTRDTN.SRC_SYS_CD_SK=CDMPG2.CD_MPPNG_SK LEFT JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG CDMPG3 ON PMTRDTN.PAYMT_RDUCTN_EXCD_SK=CDMPG3.CD_MPPNG_SK LEFT JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG CDMPG4 ON PMTRDTN.PAYMT_RDUCTN_PAYE_TYP_CD_SK=CDMPG4.CD_MPPNG_SK LEFT JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG CDMPG5 ON PMTRDTN.PAYMT_RDUCTN_PRM_TYP_CD_SK=CDMPG5.CD_MPPNG_SK LEFT JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG CDMPG6 ON PMTRDTN.PAYMT_RDUCTN_STTUS_CD_SK=CDMPG6.CD_MPPNG_SK LEFT JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG CDMPG7 ON PMTRDTN.PAYMT_RDUCTN_TYP_CD_SK=CDMPG7.CD_MPPNG_SK WHERE ((PMTRDTN.PAYMT_RDUCTN_SK NOT IN (0,1) AND PMTRDTN.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK >= @{pipeline().parameters.ExtractRunCycle} AND COALESCE(CDMPG2.TRGT_CD,'UNK')='FACETS') OR (PMTRDTN.PAYMT_RDUCTN_SK NOT IN (0,1) AND PMTRDTN.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK >= @{pipeline().parameters.LHOExtractRunCycle} AND COALESCE(CDMPG2.TRGT_CD,'UNK')='LUMERIS')), UNK_ROW AS (SELECT 0 AS PAYMT_RDUCTN_SK, 'UNK' AS PAYMT_RDUCTN_REF_ID, 'UNK' AS PAYMT_RDUCTN_SUBTYP_CD, 'UNK' AS SRC_SYS_CD, '1753-01-01' AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, '1753-01-01' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, 0 AS PAYE_PROV_SK, 0 AS APP_USER_SK, 'UNK' AS PAYMT_RDUCTN_EXCD, 'UNK' AS PAYMT_RDUCTN_EXPL_NM, 'UNK' AS PAYMT_RDUCTN_PAYE_TYP_CD, 'UNK' AS PAYMT_RDUCTN_PAYE_TYP_NM, 'UNK' AS PAYMT_RDUCTN_PRM_TYP_CD, 'UNK' AS PAYMT_RDUCTN_PRM_TYP_NM, 'UNK' AS PAYMT_RDUCTN_STTUS_CD, 'UNK' AS PAYMT_RDUCTN_STTUS_NM, 'UNK' AS PAYMT_RDUCTN_SUBTYP_NM, 'UNK' AS PAYMT_RDUCTN_TYP_CD, 'UNK' AS PAYMT_RDUCTN_TYP_NM, 'N' AS AUTO_PAYMT_RDUCTN_IN, 'UNK' AS CRT_DT_SK, '0' AS PLN_YR_DT_SK, 0 AS ORIG_RDUCTN_AMT, 0 AS PCA_OVERPD_NET_AMT, 0 AS RCVD_AMT, 0 AS RCVRED_AMT, 0 AS REMN_NET_AMT, 0 AS WRT_OFF_AMT, 'UNK' AS RDUCTN_DESC, '1753' AS TAX_YR, 100 AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, 100 AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, 0 AS IDS_LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, 0 AS PAYMT_RDUCTN_EXCD_SK, 0 AS PAYMT_RDUCTN_PAYE_TYP_CD_SK, 0 AS PAYMT_RDUCTN_PRM_TYP_CD_SK, 0 AS PAYMT_RDUCTN_STTUS_CD_SK, 0 AS PAYMT_RDUCTN_SUBTYP_CD_SK, 0 AS PAYMT_RDUCTN_TYP_CD_SK ), NA_ROW AS (SELECT 1 AS PAYMT_RDUCTN_SK, 'NA' AS PAYMT_RDUCTN_REF_ID, 'NA' AS PAYMT_RDUCTN_SUBTYP_CD, 'NA' AS SRC_SYS_CD, '1753-01-01' AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, '1753-01-01' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, 1 AS PAYE_PROV_SK, 1 AS APP_USER_SK, 'NA' AS PAYMT_RDUCTN_EXCD, 'NA' AS PAYMT_RDUCTN_EXPL_NM, 'NA' AS PAYMT_RDUCTN_PAYE_TYP_CD, 'NA' AS PAYMT_RDUCTN_PAYE_TYP_NM, 'NA' AS PAYMT_RDUCTN_PRM_TYP_CD, 'NA' AS PAYMT_RDUCTN_PRM_TYP_NM, 'NA' AS PAYMT_RDUCTN_STTUS_CD, 'NA' AS PAYMT_RDUCTN_STTUS_NM, 'NA' AS PAYMT_RDUCTN_SUBTYP_NM, 'NA' AS PAYMT_RDUCTN_TYP_CD, 'NA' AS PAYMT_RDUCTN_TYP_NM, 'N' AS AUTO_PAYMT_RDUCTN_IN, 'NA' AS CRT_DT_SK, '1' AS PLN_YR_DT_SK, 0 AS ORIG_RDUCTN_AMT, 0 AS PCA_OVERPD_NET_AMT, 0 AS RCVD_AMT, 0 AS RCVRED_AMT, 0 AS REMN_NET_AMT, 0 AS WRT_OFF_AMT, 'NA' AS RDUCTN_DESC, '1753' AS TAX_YR, 100 AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, 100 AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, 1 AS IDS_LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, 1 AS PAYMT_RDUCTN_EXCD_SK, 1 AS PAYMT_RDUCTN_PAYE_TYP_CD_SK, 1 AS PAYMT_RDUCTN_PRM_TYP_CD_SK, 1 AS PAYMT_RDUCTN_STTUS_CD_SK, 1 AS PAYMT_RDUCTN_SUBTYP_CD_SK, 1 AS PAYMT_RDUCTN_TYP_CD_SK ) SELECT * FROM mainset UNION ALL SELECT * FROM UNK_ROW UNION ALL SELECT * FROM NA_ROW

DESCRIPTION:  
This job extracts the records from the IDS table PAYMT_RDUCTN, transform and write the records into a load ready file.

Annotations:
Job Name:
IdsEdwPaymtRductnFExtr

Source Table:
PAYMT_RDUCTN

This job extracts the data from the source table, transform and write the data into a load ready file
Extract from IDS Table PAYMT_RDUCTN
Add Defaults and Null Handling
Combine extracted records, UNK and NA records
Write Data into load ready file
